name: Linda's Pumpkin Trifle
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Prepared crumbled unfrosted cake, muffins or gingerbread butterscotch pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Set aside 1/4 cup of cake crumbs for the top layer.
2. Divide the remaining cake crumbs into four portions. Sprinkle one portion into the bottom of a trifle bowl or 3-quart serving bowl.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine pumpkin purée, spices, cold milk, and pudding mix; stir until smooth.
4. Spoon half of this mixture into the serving bowl. Sprinkle with a second portion of cake crumbs.
5. Whip cream until stiff and spoon half onto the crumbs. Sprinkle with a third portion of cake crumbs.
6. Add the remaining pumpkin mixture, then the last portion of cake crumbs and whipped cream to the bowl.
7. Finish by sprinkling the reserved cake crumbs on top and around the edge of the bowl. Place cherries in the center if desired.
8. Cover and chill for at least 2 hours before serving.
Yield: 12-15 servings
